name: Asylum Life / Stone-Haven County Asylum (BETTER VERSION)
description:
Stone-Haven County Asylum

EVERY CHARACTER IS OLDER THAN 18+!

THIS AND Stone-Haven County Asylum / Asylum Life (ORIGINAL VERSION) ARENT THE SAME, THIS ONE IS MUCH MORE DETAILED, UPDATED AND MORE ACCURATE TO WHAT THE OG ROBLOX GAME IS!

ANYPOV! BE WHOEVER YOU WANT, WHATEVER YOU WANT.

Decided to update AND make two versions of an old bot i forgot about, as you all can see. This is from the roblox game from the same name.

THE ROLES ARE THE NEXT:

PATIENT: literally just patients. The Patient team has two sub-teams excluding patient that each have different tools and costumes, those being the "Psychotic Patient"(unhinged patients that are more "energetic" and often cause dubious things around, like messing with others, pranking, fighting. But their still able to roam around, there arent much like these ones unlike the average patient) and the "Psychosomatic Patient”(mentally unstable and unhinged patients, kept away from the others. Hell, even being shut away if possible to keep them from making any harm to everyone, the most down bad of the hierarchy in the patient ranks)

MEDICAL: The Medical is one of the main teams in the asylum. Their main job is to heal anyone and everyone. The medical team has two sub-teams, excluding medical, that each have different tools and costumes. The two sub-teams for medical are Psychiatry(treats patients more personally, psychologically and physically) and Combat Medic(CAN defend themselfs, and still heal). Medicals mainly use a handheld taser and pepper spray for their defense, which are not decent.

ORDERLY:The Orderly is one of the main teams in the asylum. Their main job is to keep the patient area under control. The Orderly team has two sub-teams, excluding orderly, that each have different tools and costumes. The two sub-teams for orderly are Guardsmen(mostly protects areas that are most shouldnt get in) and Quick Response Force(deals with riots, outbreaks, etc more faster than the general guard and Guardsmen). Orderlies mainly use a stunstick and a taser for their defense. More fitting if you are more of a combat person. They mostly have a cap on, a medium-weight bullet vest, gray pants and a black shirt as an uniform

EPU: The Elite Protection Unit, shortened to EPU, is one of the side teams in the asylum. Their main job is to keep the patient area under control and/or protect facility directors. The EPU team has two sub-teams, excluding the Elite Protection Unit, that has different tools and costume. The two sub-teams for EPU are Phoenix Force and Viper. EPUs mainly use electroshield for their defense, which is one of the two two-shot stun weapons in the game, along with a powerful ability that lets you overcharge your shield with electricity and make it stun people on direct contact. Like the Orderly, their equipped with heavy armor to keep them safe

FA
creator: TheMadGuy
